title: Change '200 happy clients' to 'dozens of satisfied customers'

requirements.text: In the Hero component (frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx), find the trust indicator stat that reads '200 happy clients' (or '200+' / '200 Happy Clients' or any similar variant) and replace it with 'dozens of satisfied customers'. Update both the number/value and the label text so no reference to '200' or 'happy clients' remains.

quotes: Change 200 happy clients to dozens of satisfied customers

acceptanceCriteria: The Hero section no longer displays the text '200' or 'happy clients' in any form.
The trust indicator now reads 'dozens of satisfied customers' (or equivalent natural phrasing matching the existing stat style).
No other content in the Hero section is altered.

nonGoals: Changing any other stats or trust indicators in the Hero section.
Modifying any other component outside of Hero.tsx.
